title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 and discusses harness engineering, AI loops, and their applications in regulated industries. The video explores tensions between open and closed source AI models, risks of model shutdowns, and the state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on experience since 2023 in the space.
writeup: Cyril Imhof walks through Claude Fable 5 and the practice of harness engineering, where AI loops and agentic workflows are wrapped around a foundation model to carry out tasks. The video applies these ideas to regulated industries and weighs the tradeoffs between open and closed source models, including the risk that a closed model can be shut down. It also assesses the current state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on the channel's work in the space since 2023.
